# Audit Reports Directory

This directory contains automated audit reports generated by the scripts in `../scripts/`.

## Generated Files

When you run `npm run audit:all`, the following files will be created here:

- `colors-issues.json` - All color-related issues
- `texts-issues.json` - All text/i18n issues  
- `constants-issues.json` - All constants issues
- `responsive-issues.json` - All responsive design issues
- `unused-files.json` - All unused/duplicate files
- `master-report.json` - Combined JSON report
- `summary.md` - Human-readable summary with action plan

## Usage

1. Run the audit: `npm run audit:all`
2. Read `summary.md` for overview and priorities
3. Check individual JSON files for detailed issues
4. Fix issues based on priority
5. Run audit again to verify fixes

## Note

These files are gitignored and generated locally. Each developer should run the audits on their own machine.
